entries.purpose: Thin wrapper for deterministic EquipmentDiagnostics catalog and manual-intake verification.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep the wrapper thin and preserve verifier exit-code semantics.
entries.riskIfChanged: Wrapper drift can hide blocking catalog, provenance, safety, or manual-intake validation findings.

entries.purpose: Thin wrapper for automated EquipmentDiagnostics branch readiness verification.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep the wrapper thin and preserve branch-readiness exit-code semantics.
entries.riskIfChanged: Wrapper drift can hide forbidden scope changes, unsafe wording, or failed build/test checks.

entries.purpose: Thin wrapper for deterministic PR body generation from a branch readiness report.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep the wrapper thin and preserve deterministic PR body generation.
entries.riskIfChanged: Wrapper drift can produce stale or incomplete PR readiness summaries.

entries.purpose: Thin developer-flow wrapper that verifies branch readiness before preparing a PR body.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep fail-fast orchestration thin and preserve child-script exit codes.
entries.riskIfChanged: Wrapper drift can prepare PR metadata from a failing or stale readiness report.

entries.purpose: Thin local developer smoke for the deterministic EquipmentDiagnostics bot diagnostic endpoint.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep the smoke thin, local-only, and independent of external services.
entries.riskIfChanged: Smoke drift can hide bot endpoint transport or contract failures.

entries.purpose: Optional local deterministic smoke runner for source-controlled EquipmentDiagnostics bot field scenarios.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep the runner local-only and aligned with the source-controlled scenario contract.
entries.riskIfChanged: Runner drift can hide facade/API scenario status or response-boundary mismatches.

entries.purpose: Operator helper for configuring the reviewed EquipmentDiagnostics Telegram webhook without printing the bot token.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep secret validation, HTTPS validation, token redaction, and WhatIf behavior intact.
entries.riskIfChanged: Script drift can expose Telegram secrets or configure an unintended webhook target.

entries.purpose: Sanitized operator helper for inspecting Telegram webhook status without printing the bot token.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep token redaction, sanitized URL output, and WhatIf behavior intact.
entries.riskIfChanged: Script drift can expose Telegram secrets or hide webhook delivery failures.

entries.purpose: Operator helper for deliberately deleting a Telegram webhook without printing the bot token.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep token redaction, explicit pending-update choice, and WhatIf behavior intact.
entries.riskIfChanged: Script drift can expose Telegram secrets or unintentionally drop pending updates.

entries.purpose: Provider-neutral wrapper for building the example API, frontend, and reverse-proxy images.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep compose-file override and failure propagation behavior intact.
entries.riskIfChanged: Wrapper drift can build unintended images or hide failed image builds.

entries.purpose: Provider-neutral wrapper for starting the reviewed production-like Docker Compose scaffold.
entries.recommendedAction: Preserve the ignored deploy/.env precondition and non-zero failure behavior.
entries.riskIfChanged: Wrapper drift can start the stack with missing or unintended configuration.

entries.purpose: Provider-neutral wrapper for stopping the production-like Docker Compose scaffold.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep compose-file override and failure propagation behavior intact.
entries.riskIfChanged: Wrapper drift can leave deployment services running or target the wrong compose project.

entries.purpose: Deterministic smoke wrapper for frontend, API health, bot response, and disabled Telegram webhook defaults.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep smoke checks secret-free and preserve disabled-by-default Telegram verification.
entries.riskIfChanged: Smoke drift can miss broken routing or accidental Telegram enablement.

entries.purpose: Sanitized pre-deployment validation for the ignored production environment file and source-controlled placeholder example.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep required-key, Telegram enablement, discovery, allowlist, and secret-format checks intact without printing secret values.
entries.riskIfChanged: Validation drift can permit incomplete production configuration or disclose Telegram secrets.

entries.purpose: Static provider-neutral validation for deployment files, compose services, proxy routing, placeholders, and secret-free defaults.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep default validation daemon-independent and preserve optional Docker Compose config verification.
entries.riskIfChanged: Validation drift can hide broken routing, provider lock-in, database additions, or committed secrets.

entries.purpose: Local equivalent of the provider-neutral deployment CI dry-run with optional Docker image builds.
entries.wrapsTool: deployment validators + optional docker compose config and docker build
entries.recommendedAction: Keep static validation daemon-independent and preserve explicit RequireDocker and BuildImages behavior.
entries.riskIfChanged: Runner drift can diverge local deployment readiness checks from CI or accidentally introduce deployment behavior.

entries.purpose: Offline deterministic sanitization of operational log text before incident review.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep redaction rules aligned with OperationalSecretRedactor and never print raw input.
entries.riskIfChanged: Redaction drift can expose secrets, chat IDs, or Telegram message bodies in incident artifacts.

entries.purpose: Provider-neutral collection of recent Docker Compose logs into ignored sanitized incident artifacts.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep raw logs in memory only and write exclusively sanitized output under artifacts/operations.
entries.riskIfChanged: Collector drift can write raw log dumps or expose operational secrets.

entries.purpose: Thin wrapper that generates ignored EquipmentDiagnostics closed-beta readiness JSON and Markdown reports.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep the wrapper secret-free and aligned with the deterministic beta-readiness command.
entries.riskIfChanged: Readiness drift can hide closed-beta blockers or imply unsupported production readiness.

entries.purpose: CLI tool project for verification, release gating, governance, or artifact generation.
entries.recommendedAction: Review authoring metadata TODO surface and split authoring policy helpers.
entries.riskIfChanged: Tool contract drift can break scripts/workflows and invalidate governance artifacts.

entries.purpose: CLI tool project for verification, release gating, governance, or artifact generation.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep tool CLI contract stable and wrapper-compatible.
entries.riskIfChanged: Tool contract drift can break scripts/workflows and invalidate governance artifacts.

entries.purpose: Deterministic EquipmentDiagnostics runtime catalog, staging intake, documentation example, and promotion-readiness verifier.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep verifier rules deterministic and preserve blocking exit-code semantics.
entries.riskIfChanged: Verifier drift can admit duplicate, unsafe, weakly sourced, or promotion-ineligible diagnostic knowledge.

entries.purpose: CI workflow wrapper for scripted verification/release gates.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep workflow invocation semantics stable; update only with matching governance tests.
entries.riskIfChanged: Workflow trigger/step drift can hide required checks or weaken release-gate visibility.

entries.purpose: CI workflow wrapper for scripted verification/release gates.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep workflow invocation semantics stable; update only with matching governance tests.

entries.purpose: CI workflow wrapper for scripted verification/release gates.

entries.purpose: CI workflow wrapper for scripted verification/release gates.

entries.riskIfChanged: Workflow trigger/step drift can hide required checks or weaken release-gate visibility.

entries.purpose: Focused pull-request workflow for EquipmentDiagnostics branch readiness verification and PR body evidence.
entries.recommendedAction: Keep PR path filters and readiness verification aligned with the local developer command.
entries.riskIfChanged: Workflow drift can allow EquipmentDiagnostics PRs to omit local readiness policy or lose report evidence.

entries.purpose: Provider-neutral deployment scaffold validation, Compose config verification, and local CI image build dry-run without deploy or push.
entries.wrapsTool: scripts/deployment validators + docker compose config + docker build
entries.recommendedAction: Keep workflow secret-free and prohibit deploy, SSH, registry login, and image push steps.
entries.riskIfChanged: Workflow drift can hide broken deployment images or introduce unintended production deployment behavior.

nonClaims: No release gate semantics change claim.
No public API route change claim.
No global EF query filter claim.
